description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week Ethan Qiu logged 27 hrs 31 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 36 mins. His WakaTime activity was spread across 5 projects, and the tracked languages were Java, Other, and Markdown. He had no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories recorded.
